Vocabulary - प्रशस्तः मार्गः | Story 11

26 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
उत or / or else
पुरतः in front
न किमपि nothing
उक्त said / spoken
पक्षिण birds
गच्छता कालेन in the course of time

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
तत् किमपि मास्तु Don’t want that.
किमपि न भवति Nothing happens.
तथा किमपि नास्ति No, it is not so.
पठनं किमपि नास्ति वा? Nothing to read? (Don’t you have anything to read?)
भवान् किमपि न खादितवान्? You haven’t eaten anything.
   
किमपि उक्तवान् वा? Did you say anything?
कदा उक्तवान् भोः? When did you say so?
भवान् न उक्तवान् एव You have not told me.
कमपि अहम् उक्तवान् अस्मि I haven’t told anyone.
   
वृक्षे बहवः पक्षिणः अहं दृष्टवती I saw lots of birds in the trees.
क्षेत्रस्य उपरि एकस्य पक्षिणां समूहस्य डयनं वयं दृष्टवन्तः We watched a flock of birds fly over the field.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
